title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on conservation and human impact on nature.

questions.question: Do you think humans have a moral responsibility to protect other species, even at significant economic cost?
How optimistic are you about the future of biodiversity on Earth, and what developments give you hope or concern?

script.text: Do you think humans have a moral responsibility to protect other species, even at significant economic cost?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
